name: My work injury claim got denied in West Valley City - now what?
description: Appeal to Labor Commission within 20 days with stronger evidence.[2]

mainEntity.name: My work injury claim got denied in West Valley City - now what?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal to Labor Commission within 20 days with stronger evidence.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal to Utah Labor Commission within 20 days of denial notice.[2] Context: Denials often due to causation disputes or scope of employment issues.[2][3] Key factors: Gather more medical evidence; idiopathic falls need proof of work aggravation.[3] Practical guidance: File appeal form online; consider attorney for hearing prep. Many denials overturned with better proof. Act fast as deadlines strict.
